title: Matching Game
subtitle: Flip cards in pairs. Match ranks to score points.

phase.awaiting_third: K + Q! Flip a third card to try for a triple

help.title: How to play
help.matchBody: Flip two cards on your turn. They match only when both the rank and the suit are identical (e.g. 5♥ + 5♥). Every card in the deck appears twice — find the twin. Matched cards stay face-up.
help.scoringBody: Number cards (2–10): face value. Aces: 1 point. Jacks, Queens, Kings: 10 points each.
help.specialBody: Two Jacks → bonus turn. Two Kings → next player loses a turn. King + Queen → flip a third card; if it's also K or Q, score 10.
help.endBody: The game ends when every card is matched. Highest score wins; ties are possible.

errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Is the backend running?
errors.invalidMove: That move isn't allowed right now.
